metadata.description: A small marketplace of focused agent skills, packaged as Claude Code plugins and installable cross-agent via npx skills.

plugins.name: gen-image
plugins.description: Generate educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and get back ready-to-paste image links. Single or batch. Configurable output dirs, model map, and link format.

plugins.name: gen-suno
plugins.description: Write Suno-ready song lyrics and generate the audio via the gen-suno CLI. One-off songs about any topic, or a chained prerequisite album engineered for memorization with clearly-enunciated vocals.
